remarks: Build your dream home on this exceptional parcel at 19 Lakeview Dr in Riverside, offering a rare opportunity to create a custom residence in one of Greenwich's most desirable neighborhoods. This property comes with a thoughtfully designed proposed site plan featuring a spacious new single-family home, modern driveway approach, and integrated stormwater management system, providing a strong foundation for future development. With approximately 18,507 square feet in the R-12 zone, the lot offers flexibility for a generous home footprint, outdoor living areas, and potential enhancements such as terraces or landscaped gardens, all while taking advantage of the natural topography. Ideally situated near local parks, shopping and transportation, this is a unique chance to bring your vision to life in a well-established residential setting. Buyers to perform their own due diligence and verify all approvals.  House on land is sold as-is
